payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial edge crop of a dark reddish-brown (mahogany) wooden cabinet with a glossy lacquered finish, showing a small top drawer with a round brass knob above a raised-panel door with ornamental trim; visible surface wear near the handle — appears to be photographed at approximately 0.5 m from the camera.
